_comment: free-tts server configuration. Copy this to config.json and edit.
_host: Listen address. Use 0.0.0.0 to accept remote connections.
_default_voice: Fallback voice when SSML omits <voice name>. See GET /voices for options.
_max_ssml_length: Max SSML payload in bytes. 0 = unlimited.
_tts_stall_timeout: Seconds of silence from Microsoft before aborting. 0 = disable.
_max_concurrent: Max concurrent TTS generation requests. 0 = unlimited.
_cors_origins: Allowed browser origins. Plain strings or regex patterns (^...$). 'null' = file:// pages.
